posts.author: DamienHouse
posts.body: Predictions: 6 of 6 Pending | Tied for 1st with 135 others Jonathan Haggerty vs Yuki Yoza for Haggerty's Bantamweight Kickboxing belt has been added, as well as Yuya Wakamatsu vs Avazbek Kholmirzaev for the Flyweight MMA belt.https://twitter.com/ONEChampionship/status/2028395036124303619 https://twitter.com/i/status/2028395028134117634 * Edited at 03.02.2026, 4:21 AM ET *

posts.author: D1D4K10
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 6 Pending | Tied for 1st with 135 others Both are bangers. I hope no one pulls out and this doesn't turn into ONE 173's situation; from 7 title fights we only got 4 * Edited at 03.02.2026, 7:07 AM ET *

posts.author: FightConnoisseur
posts.body: Predictions: 2 of 6 Pending | Tied for 1st with 135 others Wakamatsu vs. KholmirzaevAvazbek Kholmirzaev, SUB, R2Let’s go

posts.author: DamienHouse
posts.body: Predictions: 6 of 6 Pending | Tied for 1st with 135 others Keito Yamakita vs Ryohei Kurosawa, Itsuki Hirata vs Ritu Phogat, and Ayaka Miura vs Chihiro Sawada have all been added.

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 6 of 6 Pending | Tied for 1st with 135 others Wakamatsu vs. KholmirzaevAvazbek Kholmirzaev, TKO, R2Charlie prospect 🫡☝️🐷🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿Hirata vs. PhogatItsuki Hirata, DECHirata is terrible but she should win this one. She struggled even with her layup fight against the Indian tho, so who knows. She should be a model instead of a fighter, she’s a smokeshow
